t.title: CR Farm Products — Costa Rica Agricultural Exports

meta.name: description
meta.content: Premium tropical root vegetables, coconuts and sugar cane exported fresh from Costa Rica to North America, Europe and the Caribbean. GLOBALG.A.P. certified.

div.h1:
We Harvest
For You
& Your Family's Health
div.p: Direct-source tropical root vegetables, coconuts & sugar cane from the volcanic soils of San Carlos, Costa Rica — exported fresh to North America, Europe & the Caribbean.

div.h2:
Fresh from Costa Rica's
Volcanic Soils
div.p: Root vegetables, tubers, coconuts & sugar cane — grown under strict agricultural standards and exported year-round.

div.h2:
10 Reasons to Partner
with CR Farm Products

div.p: No intermediaries. We work directly with our partner farms to guarantee quality and competitive pricing at every step.
Professionals in planting and harvesting with over two decades of agricultural expertise in Costa Rica's most fertile regions.
Products are never stored — we ship fresh from harvest to your destination port, maintaining peak quality and shelf life.
Products available in required weights and quantities — from single pallets to full container loads — to fit your exact import needs.
We adapt packaging size, weight, and presentation format to your specific market and retail requirements. EU or USA standard available.
San Carlos offers ideal growing conditions and excellent freight accessibility through Puerto Limón — Costa Rica's main export port.
Our Miami, FL office provides local support, account management, and direct coordination for all US and North American clients.
We work with importers, wholesale distributors, and logistics partners to deliver to your preferred port or warehouse on time.
Sell our premium Costa Rican produce under your own brand. We offer private label solutions for wholesalers and retailers worldwide.
GLOBALG.A.P., Esencial Costa Rica, and PYME certified — ensuring food safety, traceability, worker welfare, and environmental responsibility.

div.h2:
Ready to Source Premium
Costa Rican Produce?
div.p: Contact our team today and receive a custom quote for your import needs within 24 hours.

meta.name: description
meta.content: CR Farm Products was founded in 2005 by four brothers in San Carlos, Costa Rica. Learn about our history, mission, and commitment to quality agricultural exports.

div.p: A family-owned company born from generations of agricultural passion in Costa Rica's most fertile region.

div.h2:
From Family Farm
to Global Exporter
div.p: CR Farm Products was founded in 2005 by four brothers who inherited a deep love for agriculture from their father. What began as a small family operation in San Carlos, Alajuela — Costa Rica's most productive agricultural region — has grown into one of the leading companies in the production and exportation of agricultural products from Costa Rica.

Our first exports were ginger and pumpkin to the United States. Today, we export 19 product lines to buyers across North America, Europe, and the Caribbean, with a permanent representative office in Miami, Florida to support our North American clients directly.
Despite our growth, we remain a family business — guided by our core values of quality, commitment, and love for the land. Every shipment carries our family's name and our promise of freshness.
CR Farm Products established in San Carlos, Costa Rica. First exports: ginger and pumpkin to the United States.
Expanded from 2 to 19+ product lines including yuca, malanga, eddoes, coconut, and multiple sugar cane varieties.
Achieved GLOBALG.A.P. certification, meeting the requirements of European supermarket supply chains and major North American importers.
Established a permanent presence in Miami to directly support importers, wholesalers, and distributors across North America.
Exporting to USA, Canada, UK, France, Spain, Netherlands, and the Caribbean. Continuously investing in sustainability, quality, and technology.

div.h2:
Quality, Commitment,
& Love for the Land

div.p: To deliver the highest quality Costa Rican agricultural products to international markets — directly from our farms, fresh, certified, and on time.
To be the most trusted Costa Rican agricultural exporter worldwide, synonymous with freshness, reliability, and sustainable farming practices.
Family, integrity, environmental responsibility, agricultural excellence, and long-term commitment to our clients, partners, and workers worldwide.

div.h2:
Two Locations,
One Standard of Excellence

div.p: Our primary operations are in San Carlos, Alajuela — Costa Rica's agricultural heartland with volcanic soils, ideal rainfall, and optimal growing conditions for tropical root vegetables and tropical fruits.

Our Miami representative office serves importers, wholesale distributors, and retailers across the United States and Canada, providing local support and direct account management for all North American clients.
Contact our team — we'd love to discuss your import requirements.

meta.name: description
meta.content: Browse our full catalog of 19 premium Costa Rican agricultural products: yuca, malanga, eddoes, ginger, coconut, sugar cane, sweet potato, and more.

div.p: Root vegetables, tubers, coconuts & sugar cane — fresh from Costa Rica's volcanic soils.
Full technical data sheets, HS codes, packaging specs, and more for all 19 products.

div.style: width:100%; height:360px; background:var(--crfarm-bg-light); border-radius:20px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:80px;
font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; color:var(--crfarm-accent); margin-bottom:10px;
font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; color:var(--crfarm-accent); margin-bottom:10px;
font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; color:var(--crfarm-accent); margin-bottom:10px;

meta.name: description
meta.content: CR Farm Products holds GLOBALG.A.P., Esencial Costa Rica, and PYME certifications, ensuring international food safety, sustainability, and quality standards.

div.p: Our operations meet the most rigorous international agricultural, sustainability, and business standards — independently certified and continuously renewed.

The world's leading standard for Good Agricultural Practice. GLOBALG.A.P. certification is required by major European supermarket chains and most North American importers. It covers the entire supply chain from seed to shipment.

Costa Rica's official national brand for products and companies representing excellence in quality, sustainability, and innovation. Being an Esencial Costa Rica company reflects our alignment with the country's values and global reputation for environmental leadership.

Official Small and Medium Enterprise recognition by Costa Rica's Ministry of Economy, Industry and Commerce. This certification supports the local agricultural economy and demonstrates our commitment to formal, transparent, and sustainable business operations.

From seed selection to the moment your shipment arrives, every process at CR Farm Products follows strict quality protocols. Our certifications are not just documents — they are a reflection of our operational culture.

div.div: Full lot tracking from field to port

div.p: Our team can provide full certification documentation for your import requirements.

meta.name: description
meta.content: Photos of CR Farm Products' farming operations, harvests, packaging, and agricultural facilities in San Carlos, Costa Rica.

div.p: A look into our farms, harvests, packaging facilities, and export operations in San Carlos, Costa Rica.

meta.name: description
meta.content: Contact CR Farm Products to request a quote, ask about our products, or discuss your import needs. B2B inquiries welcome.

div.p: Ready to source premium Costa Rican agricultural products? Fill out the form and we'll respond within 24 hours.
All fields marked * are required. Our export team will respond within 24 hours.
div.div: ✅ Thank you! Your inquiry has been received. Our export team will contact you within 24 hours.
❌ Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

textarea.name: message
textarea.placeholder: Tell us about your import needs, the products you are interested in, your destination port, and any specific requirements...
